# integrationMcpServerConnect

[INTERNAL] Connects the workspace with an MCP server.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`IntegrationPayload`](../objects/integration_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `serverUrl` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The URL of the MCP server to connect with. |
| `teamId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `n/a` | No | The ID of the team to connect the MCP server to. |
| `workflowDefinitionId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md) | `n/a` | No | The ID of the workflow definition to connect the MCP server to. |
